mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (session_id, user_id, message_type, content, dify_message_id, parent_message_id, sort_order, create_time, deleted) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{messageType}, #{content}, #{difyMessageId}, #{parentMessageId}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
